query:
-- Get videoCharacters for job 510099
SELECT vc.id, vc.name, vc.description, vc.photoUrl, vc.lipSyncEnabled, vc.gender, vc.animStyle
FROM videoCharacters vc
WHERE vc.jobId = 510099
ORDER BY vc.id;
command:
